PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LO, YI CHONG HU, JIN ZHANG, GUARDIAN AD LITEM FOR MINOR HU, JING YA, A MINOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO $8,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $844.91 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,844.91, ON REVISED AWARD OF ARBITRATOR- DEFENDANT TO PAY PLAINTIFF LO $7500 AND PLAINTIFF HU $500, AND STATUTORY COSTS OF SUIT.
